- **Operating System**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- **Server Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Claude Desktop Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]

  "mcpServers": {
